---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the user or engineering problem this request addresses.

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior, workflow, or API.

## Scope Notes

- Does this affect TUI behavior, config defaults, metadata, or runtime packaging?
- Does this require new data-source semantics or protocol changes?

## Validation

Describe how the change should be tested or verified.
